overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through the neon-lit streets of Night City. The player character moves through narrow alleys, commercial plazas, and corridors filled with NPCs, vibrant neon signage, and cyberpunk architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: side alley approaching neon-lit commercial street

events.description: passing a woman in a white outfit walking in the opposite direction
entering the narrow alley with the El Coyote Cojo bar entrance

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a side alley toward a main commercial street, navigating past a pedestrian

notable_agents.action: woman in white outfit walking toward the camera then passing by on the left

entered.detail: large green industrial container with mesh sides and warning stripes
building facade completely bathed in red neon light with multiple windows
wide concrete stairs leading up to a building entrance
purple neon sign for El Coyote Cojo bar with stylized lettering

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow side alley with a green dumpster visible on the right. The player walks forward toward a building bathed in red neon light, passing a woman in white. The El Coyote Cojo sign becomes visible as the player approaches the entrance to a narrow commercial alley.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow commercial alley with bars and tech shops

events.description: encountering groups of NPCs standing and conversing in the alleyway
exiting the narrow alley into a wider street with hotel signage

agents.ego_description: walking through the crowded narrow alley, navigating between groups of standing NPCs and street debris

notable_agents.action: group of NPCs standing and conversing near the El Coyote Cojo entrance
NPCs browsing near the Softsys storefront

entered.detail: green neon sign for Softsys store with futuristic lettering
large overhead digital screen displaying advertisements above the street
vertical pink neon light strip running down the building facade
scattered debris and litter covering the asphalt street

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a narrow neon-lit alley flanked by the El Coyote Cojo bar and Softsys store. Groups of NPCs stand along the street, which is littered with trash. A large digital billboard is visible overhead as the player moves toward the alley exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: uphill street with hotels and mixed commercial buildings

events.description: turning right and ascending slightly uphill on the street
approaching the open market plaza with visible food stalls ahead

agents.ego_description: walking uphill on a wider street, passing by a hotel entrance and graffiti-covered walls

entered.detail: red neon sign for Hotel on the building facade
concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art
yellow and black striped bollards blocking vehicle access to the street
small food vendor stall with illuminated menu boards

segments.scene_description: Exiting the narrow alley, the player turns right onto a wider uphill street. A red neon Hotel sign is visible on the left, while the right side features graffiti-covered walls. The street is blocked by bollards, and a food stall becomes visible in the distance as the player approaches a market plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: open market plaza with food vendors and wet pavement

events.description: entering the busier market area with multiple food stalls and increased pedestrian activity
moving from the open market into the commercial district with the Pharmacology building

agents.ego_description: walking through the market plaza, passing food stalls and navigating around groups of NPCs

notable_agents.action: NPC in bright cyan outfit walking ahead of the player toward the plaza center

entered.detail: tall multi-story building with vertical signage and industrial architecture
reflective wet asphalt surface showing neon reflections
metal elevated walkway structure crossing overhead

segments.scene_description: The player enters an open market plaza with wet pavement reflecting the neon lights. Food stalls line the right side, while the large Pharmacology building rises on the left. An elevated walkway crosses overhead as the player moves through moderate crowds toward the commercial district.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial plaza with elevated walkways and concrete stairs

events.description: approaching and ascending concrete stairs leading to an upper plaza level
passing through the barrier into a narrow corridor with vending machines

agents.ego_description: walking through the commercial plaza, ascending stairs and navigating under elevated structures

notable_agents.action: NPC in white shirt and black pants walking alongside the player

entered.detail: vertical cyan neon sign reading PHARMACOLOGY on the building facade
wide concrete stairs with metal railings leading to upper level
concrete barrier with red graffiti reading REGRETS
row of purple automated vending machines with illuminated displays

segments.scene_description: Moving through the commercial plaza, the player approaches wide concrete stairs beneath an elevated walkway. The vertical Pharmacology sign glows cyan on the left. The player passes a barrier with REGRETS graffiti and approaches a row of purple vending machines at the corridor entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service corridor with vending machines and storage lockers

events.description: entering the narrow corridor with green-lit lockers on the left wall
passing rows of purple vending machines and green storage lockers

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow corridor past vending machines and storage lockers, following an NPC ahead

notable_agents.action: NPC in beige jacket walking ahead into the corridor

entered.detail: wall of green-lit storage lockers with digital displays
illuminated vertical advertisement screen on the right wall
exposed pipes and conduits running along the corridor ceiling

segments.scene_description: The player enters a narrow service corridor lit by artificial lighting. Purple vending machines line the left side, followed by a wall of green-lit storage lockers. The ceiling features exposed pipes and conduits. The player follows an NPC in a beige jacket deeper into the corridor as the video ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a claustrophobic side alley through a vibrant commercial plaza and into a sterile service corridor. It begins in a narrow alley beside a green dumpster, moving past a woman in white toward the red neon glow of the El Coyote Cojo entrance. As the camera pushes through a trash-strewn passage flanked by a Softsys store and a towering digital billboard, the space opens up into a wider uphill street marked by graffiti and a red hotel sign. The scene then expands into a wet market plaza where neon lights reflect off the pavement between food stalls and the massive Pharmacology building, before the camera ascends concrete stairs beneath an elevated walkway. Finally, the environment shifts from the open plaza into a narrow, artificially lit service corridor, passing purple vending machines and green storage lockers while following an NPC deeper into the industrial interior.
